subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Most Great Prison, the Spot wherein God, the Lord of Eternity, doth gaze, and therein thou didst beseech God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک فی السجن الاعظم منظر الله مالک القدم و فیه سئلت الله مولی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
